note: GRX-009 segment-1 gated scaffold state for the luminance_reduction pass. The pass is default-disabled (project setting rendering/rurix_accel/passes/luminance_reduction/enabled=false) and the Rurix bridge rxgd_record_pass currently always returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_LUMINANCE_REDUCTION because no compiled Rurix DXIL luminance kernel exists, so the native Godot luminance path stays active. This document records that disabled/fallback wiring state only: it is NOT measured telemetry, no real in-engine fallback event was captured, and no acceleration, visual verification, or performance improvement is claimed.
